title: Key Rotation Policy
body: Rotate keys every 90 days. All active integrations must have their credentials rotated within 90 days of the last rotation. Non-compliant integrations will be flagged for immediate remediation.

title: Rotation Compliance Status
body: Placeholder: rotation compliance findings will be recorded here.

title: API Authentication Guide
body: All APIs must use OAuth2.0 or API keys. Keys should be stored in a secure vault and rotated according to the Key Rotation Policy.

title: Data Archival Policy
body: Data older than 7 years must be archived to cold storage. No action required for key rotation.
